holdings.infoBox: DVYA is an equity ETF with a total of 67 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 10.90%, Fortescue at 5.20%, Honda Motor at 5.04%, DBS Group Holdings at 4.75%, and Oversea-Chinese Banking Corporation at 3.81%.

overview.description: The iShares Asia/Pacific Dividend ETF (DVYA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of consistent highest dividend-yielding companies in the Asia-Pacific region. DVYA was launched on Feb 23, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Dow Jones Asia/Pacific Select Dividend 50 Index
